svg.title: Organizational chart of W3C in 1997 and now.
svg.desc: By clicking on the current version, it disappears and the other appears

image.desc: Organizational chart of W3C in a tabular form. Coloumns correspond to Domain, with Activities and Groups indented.
Organizational chart of W3C in a tabular form for the year 1997. Coloumns correspond to Domain, with Activities and Groups indented.
